snippet.title: Ang Sa Iyo Ay Akin | Episode 127 (1/4) | February 9, 2021
snippet.description:
Returning to La Sierra, Marissa (Jodi Sta. Maria) executes her plan against her enemies and begins to plant seeds of doubt in CaesarŌĆÖs (Simon Ibarra) mind. After asking to join the syndicate operating within the company, Belen (Rita Avila) gets kidnapped. Later, Ellice (Iza Calzado) dons a benevolent facade as she tries to get on JakeŌĆÖs (Grae Fernandez) good side.

snippet.description:
╬ż╬┐ SURVIVOR, Žä╬┐ ╬▒ŽĆŽī╬╗ŽģŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬▒╬╣Žć╬Į╬»╬┤╬╣ ╬ĄŽĆ╬╣╬▓╬»ŽēŽā╬ĘŽé ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬Ż╬Ü╬æ╬¬ ╬▒╬Į╬▒╬Į╬ĄŽē╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐, ╬Ą╬╝ŽĆ╬╗╬┐ŽģŽä╬╣Žā╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐, ŽāŽģ╬Į╬▒ŽüŽĆ╬▒ŽāŽä╬╣╬║Žī ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬╝╬Ą ŽĆ╬▒╬»╬║Žä╬ĄŽé ╬ŁŽä╬┐╬╣╬╝╬┐ŽģŽé ╬Į╬▒ Žü╬╣ŽćŽä╬┐ŽŹ╬Į ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ŽāŽä╬»╬▓╬┐ ╬╝╬¼Žć╬ĘŽé. ╬×╬Ą╬║╬»╬Į╬ĘŽā╬▒╬Į ŽēŽé ╬ö╬╣╬¼Žā╬Ę╬╝╬┐╬╣ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬£╬▒Žć╬ĘŽä╬ŁŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽĆ╬╗╬Ł╬┐╬Į ŽēŽé ╬ÜŽī╬║╬║╬╣╬Į╬Ę ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽēŽé ╬£ŽĆ╬╗╬Ą ╬┐╬╝╬¼╬┤╬▒ ╬┤╬»╬Į╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬┐╬Į ╬║╬▒╬╗ŽŹŽä╬ĄŽüŽī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ╬Ą╬▒ŽģŽäŽī ╬ŁŽć╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé ŽēŽé ╬╝╬┐╬Į╬▒╬┤╬╣╬║Žī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ŽāŽäŽīŽć╬┐ Žä╬Ę ╬Į╬»╬║╬Ę. ╬ŻŽä╬┐╬Į ╬å╬│╬╣╬┐ ╬ö╬┐╬╝╬»╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐, ŽĆ╬ŁŽü╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žä╬╣Žé ŽāŽģ╬Į╬Ė╬«╬║╬ĄŽé ╬┤╬╣╬▒╬▓╬»ŽēŽā╬ĘŽé, ŽĆŽü╬ŁŽĆ╬Ą╬╣ ╬Į╬▒ ╬▒╬ĮŽä╬╣╬╝╬ĄŽäŽēŽĆ╬»Žā╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒ŽĆ╬▒╬╣Žä╬ĘŽä╬╣╬║╬ŁŽé ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬▒Žā╬»╬ĄŽé, Žä╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽüŽī╬┐ŽĆŽä╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žä╬▒ ╬Ą╬╝ŽĆŽī╬┤╬╣╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬Į╬▒ ╬▒╬Į╬▒╬╝╬ĄŽäŽü╬Ę╬Ė╬┐ŽŹ╬Į, ŽīŽć╬╣ ╬╝Žī╬Į╬┐ ╬╝╬ĄŽä╬▒╬ŠŽŹ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé, ╬▒╬╗╬╗╬¼ ŽĆ╬¼╬ĮŽē ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žī╬╗╬▒ ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐╬Į ╬»╬┤╬╣╬┐ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬┐╬Į ╬Ą╬▒ŽģŽäŽī. ╬æ╬│ŽÄ╬Į╬ĄŽé ╬ĄŽĆ╬¼╬Ė╬╗╬┐Žģ, ╬▒ŽāŽģ╬╗╬»╬▒Žé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ĄŽĆ╬╣╬║╬┐╬╣╬ĮŽē╬Į╬»╬▒Žé ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬¼╬Č╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒╬ĮŽä╬┐Žć╬ŁŽé Žä╬┐ŽģŽé. ╬ŻŽä╬┐ ╬ŻŽģ╬╝╬▓╬┐ŽŹ╬╗╬╣╬┐ ╬│╬»╬Į╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒╬╣ ╬┐╬╣ ŽĆ╬╣╬┐ ╬║Žü╬»Žā╬╣╬╝╬ĄŽé Žł╬ĘŽå╬┐Žå╬┐Žü╬»╬ĄŽé Žī╬╝ŽēŽé ╬Ę Žä╬Ą╬╗╬╣╬║╬« ╬▒ŽĆŽīŽå╬▒Žā╬Ę ╬│╬╣╬▒ Žä╬┐ ŽĆ╬┐╬╣╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬▒╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬Ą╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬å╬│╬╣╬┐ ╬ö╬┐╬╝╬»╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐ ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ Žä╬┐Žģ Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬┐ŽĆŽä╬╣╬║╬┐ŽŹ ╬║╬┐╬╣╬Į╬┐ŽŹ. ╬¤ ╬Ł╬╝ŽĆ╬Ą╬╣Žü╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬┐ŽģŽā╬╣╬▒ŽāŽä╬«Žé ╬ō╬╣ŽÄŽü╬│╬┐Žé ╬ø╬╣╬▒╬ĮŽīŽé ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ╬Ą╬║╬Ą╬»╬Į╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬▓Žü╬»Žā╬║╬ĄŽä╬▒╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬╗╬ĄŽģŽüŽī ŽäŽē╬Į ŽĆ╬▒╬╣╬║ŽäŽÄ╬Į Žā╬Ą ╬║╬¼╬Ė╬Ą ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬▒Žā╬»╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žł╬ĘŽå╬┐Žå╬┐Žü╬»╬▒ ╬▓╬¼╬Č╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬Ė╬Ą╬▒Žä╬ŁŽé ŽāŽä╬┐ ╬║╬╗╬»╬╝╬▒. ╬ż╬┐ SURVIVOR╬┤╬»╬Į╬Ą╬╣ Žü╬▒╬ĮŽä╬Ą╬▓╬┐ŽŹ ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬Ė╬Ą╬▒Žä╬ŁŽé Žä╬┐Žģ ╬Ż╬Ü╬æ╬¬ ╬║╬¼╬Ė╬Ą ╬ÜŽģŽü╬╣╬▒╬║╬« ŽāŽä╬╣Žé 21.00 ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬▒ŽĆŽī╬ö╬ĄŽģŽä╬ŁŽü╬▒ ╬ŁŽēŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ż╬ĄŽä╬¼ŽüŽä╬Ę ŽāŽä╬╣Žé 22.00.

snippet.title: Emanet 112. B├Čl├╝m Fragman─▒ | Legacy Episode 112 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman K─▒r─▒ml─▒ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherŌĆÖs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewŌĆ” Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleŌĆÖs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

After asking to join the syndicate operating within the company, Belen (Rita Avila) gets kidnapped. Later, Ellice (Iza Calzado) dons a benevolent facade as she tries to get on JakeŌĆÖs (Grae Fernandez) good side.

snippet.title: Emanet 113. B├Čl├╝m Fragman─▒ | Legacy Episode 113 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman K─▒r─▒ml─▒ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherŌĆÖs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewŌĆ” Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleŌĆÖs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: 2 KOTSE AT LIMPAK-LIMPAK NA PERA, IPINAMUDMOD NG OFW SA KANYANG PRETTY GF!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

╬¤ ╬┤╬┐╬╗╬┐ŽåŽī╬Į╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬╣╬¼ŽāŽä╬Ę╬║╬Ą ŽāŽä╬Ę╬Į ŽäŽā╬╣╬╝ŽĆ╬»╬┤╬▒ Žä╬┐Žģ ╬ĮŽī╬╝╬┐Žģ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬┐╬╝╬┐╬╗Žī╬│╬ĘŽā╬ĄŌĆ”

╬ż╬╣ ╬╗╬Ł╬Ą╬╣ ╬│╬╣╬▒ Žä╬Ę╬Į ╬▒ŽĆ╬¼Žä╬Ę ŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬ŁŽāŽä╬ĘŽā╬Ą Žā╬Ą ╬▓╬¼Žü╬┐Žé Žä╬┐Žģ ŽāŽģ╬Į╬▒╬┤╬Ł╬╗Žå╬┐Žģ Žä╬┐Žģ ╬ż╬¼╬║╬Ę ╬ÆŽīŽāŽā╬┐Žģ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽĆŽēŽé Žä╬┐╬Į ╬┐╬┤╬«╬│╬ĘŽā╬Ą ŽāŽä╬┐ ╬Ż╬┐ŽŹ╬Į╬╣╬┐ ŽīŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žä╬┐╬Į Žā╬║ŽīŽäŽēŽā╬ĄŌĆ”

 

╬ŻŽä╬Ę ╬┤╬╣╬▒╬┤Žü╬┐╬╝╬« Žä╬┐Žģ ╬╝ŽģŽāŽä╬ĘŽü╬»╬┐ŽģŌĆ”

╬ż╬┐ ┬½╬ż╬┐ŽŹ╬Į╬Ą╬╗┬╗ ╬▓Žü╬Ł╬Ė╬Ę╬║╬Ą ŽāŽä╬┐ ╬┤Žē╬╝╬¼Žä╬╣╬┐ Žä╬ĘŽé ╬▒╬│╬Į╬┐╬┐ŽŹ╬╝╬Ą╬Į╬ĘŽé ╬åŽüŽä╬Ą╬╝╬ĘŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬╝╬»╬╗╬ĘŽā╬Ą ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬▒ ŽĆŽüŽīŽāŽēŽĆ╬▒ ŽĆ╬┐Žģ Žä╬Ę╬Į ╬Ą╬»╬┤╬▒╬Į Žä╬Ą╬╗╬ĄŽģŽä╬▒╬»╬┐╬╣. ╬ż╬╣ ╬╗╬Ł╬Į╬Ą ╬Ę ╬│╬╣╬▒╬│╬╣╬¼ Žä╬ĘŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬┐ ╬╝╬╣╬║ŽüŽīŽä╬ĄŽü╬┐Žé ╬▒╬┤╬Ą╬╗ŽåŽīŽé Žä╬ĘŽé.

╬æ╬║╬┐╬╗╬┐ŽŹ╬Ė╬ĘŽā╬Ą Žä╬Ę ╬┤╬╣╬▒╬┤Žü╬┐╬╝╬« Žä╬┐Žģ ╬╝ŽģŽāŽä╬ĘŽü╬»╬┐Žģ, ŽīŽĆ╬┐Žģ Žć╬¼╬Ė╬Ę╬║╬Ą ╬Ę 19ŽćŽü╬┐╬Į╬Ę ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬▓Žü╬«╬║╬Ą ╬Į╬Ł╬┐ŽģŽé ╬╝╬¼ŽüŽäŽģŽü╬ĄŽé.

╬ż╬╣ ŽāŽģ╬Į╬Ł╬▓╬Ę ŽāŽä╬Ę ╬Æ╬¼Žü╬║╬╣╬Č╬▒ ╬╗╬»╬│╬┐ ŽĆŽü╬╣╬Į ╬Ą╬Š╬▒Žå╬▒╬Į╬╣ŽāŽä╬Ą╬»;

╬ż╬╣ ╬┤╬Ą╬Į ╬ĄŽü╬ĄŽŹ╬Į╬ĘŽā╬▒╬Į ╬┐╬╣ ╬æŽüŽć╬ŁŽé ŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬Ė╬▒ ╬Ł╬┤╬╣╬Į╬Ą ŽāŽä╬Ę╬Į ŽģŽĆŽī╬Ė╬ĄŽā╬Ę ╬¼╬╗╬╗╬Ę ŽäŽü╬┐ŽĆ╬«;

╬Ā╬┐Žģ ╬┐╬┤╬Ę╬│╬┐ŽŹ╬Į ╬┐╬╣ ╬ŁŽü╬ĄŽģ╬Į╬ĄŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žä╬▒ ┬½╬ĮŽä╬┐Žģ┬╗ ŽāŽä╬┐ ╬║╬Ł╬ĮŽäŽü╬┐ Žä╬ĘŽé ╬æ╬Ė╬«╬Į╬▒Žé;

 

╬£╬¼ŽüŽäŽģŽü╬▒Žé Žü╬»Žć╬Į╬Ą╬╣ ŽåŽēŽé ╬╝╬ŁŽā╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žä╬╣Žé ŽåŽģ╬╗╬▒╬║╬ŁŽéŌĆ”

╬Ś ╬ŁŽü╬ĄŽģ╬Į╬▒ Žä╬┐Žģ ┬½╬ż╬┐ŽŹ╬Į╬Ą╬╗┬╗ ╬│╬╣╬▒ Žä╬┐ ╬▒ŽĆ╬┐ŽäŽüŽīŽĆ╬▒╬╣╬┐ ╬Ł╬│╬║╬╗╬Ę╬╝╬▒ ╬╝╬Ą ╬ĖŽŹ╬╝╬▒ Žä╬Ę╬Į 12ŽćŽü╬┐╬Į╬Ę ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬Ā╬Ą╬╣Žü╬▒╬╣╬¼, ╬¼╬Į╬┐╬╣╬Š╬Ą Žä╬┐ ╬┤ŽüŽī╬╝╬┐ ╬│╬╣╬▒ ╬Į╬Ł╬ĄŽé ╬▒ŽĆ╬┐╬║╬▒╬╗ŽŹŽł╬Ą╬╣Žé.

╬Ś ╬æ╬│╬│╬Ą╬╗╬╣╬║╬« ╬Ø╬╣╬║╬┐╬╗╬┐ŽŹ╬╗╬Ę ŽāŽģ╬Į╬┐╬╝╬»╬╗╬ĘŽā╬Ą ╬╝╬ŁŽā╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žä╬╣Žé ŽåŽģ╬╗╬▒╬║╬ŁŽé ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐╬Į ╬╝╬¼ŽüŽäŽģŽü╬▒ Žä╬ĘŽé ŽģŽĆŽī╬Ė╬ĄŽā╬ĘŽé ŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬║╬▒Žä╬Ę╬│╬┐Žü╬Ą╬»Žä╬▒╬╣ ╬│╬╣╬▒ ╬▓╬▒Žü╬╣╬¼ ╬▒╬┤╬╣╬║╬«╬╝╬▒Žä╬▒ Žā╬Ą ╬▓╬¼Žü╬┐Žé ╬¼╬╗╬╗╬┐Žģ ╬▒╬Į╬«╬╗╬╣╬║╬┐Žģ ╬║╬┐Žü╬╣ŽäŽā╬╣╬┐ŽŹ.

╬ż╬╣ ╬╗╬Ł╬Ą╬╣ ╬│╬╣╬▒ Žä╬┐ ╬┐╬╗╬┐╬║╬▒ŽŹŽäŽē╬╝╬▒ ŽāŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬▒╬╣╬┤╬»; ╬ż╬╣ ŽāŽģ╬Į╬Ł╬▓╬Ę ╬Ą╬║╬Ą╬»╬Į╬┐ Žä╬┐ ╬╝╬┐╬╣Žü╬▒╬»╬┐ ŽĆŽüŽē╬╣╬ĮŽī;

snippet.title: Highlights: Salah and Gini secure victory for the Reds | West Ham 1-3 Liverpool
snippet.description:
A brilliant Mo Salah double, and a fine team goal finished off by Gini Wijnaldum was enough to give Liverpool all three Premier League points against West Ham United at the London Stadium.

snippet.title: Kurulu┼¤ Osman 42. B├Čl├╝m
snippet.description:
Kurulu┼¤ Osman 42. B├Čl├╝m ├¢zeti:
Osman Bey, ├¦a─¤r─▒s─▒ ├╝zerine S├Č─¤├╝tŌĆÖteki toya kat─▒lmak i├¦in yola d├╝┼¤en ve Flatyos ve adamlar─▒ taraf─▒ndan ┼¤ehit edilen T├╝rk beylerinin intikam─▒n─▒ almak ├╝zere can─▒n─▒ ortaya koyarak sava┼¤a girecek. KonstantinopolisŌĆÖten g├Čnderilen yeni birlikler sayesinde g├╝├¦lenen Nikola, c├╝retini art─▒rarak b├Člgedeki t├╝m tekfurlar─▒ bayra─¤─▒ alt─▒nda toplad─▒─¤─▒ bir Ha├¦l─▒ ittifak─▒ kuraca─¤─▒n─▒ ilan eder. Kay─▒ Beyi olduktan sonra hedefine ─░neg├Čl KalesiŌĆÖni koyan ve T├╝rk boylar─▒n─▒ birle┼¤tirmek ├╝zere harekete ge├¦en Osman Bey; NikolaŌĆÖy─▒ engellemek i├¦in zekice bir harekat planlar. Osman Bey, Ertu─¤rul BeyŌĆÖin vasiyeti uyar─▒nca yeni bir hatun alaca─¤─▒n─▒ Bala HatunŌĆÖa bildirirken; D├╝ndar Bey ise beyli─¤ini kabul etmi┼¤ g├Čr├╝nd├╝─¤├╝ ye─¤enine kar┼¤─▒ plan kurmaktan ve beylik ├╝zerindeki iddias─▒ndan vazge├¦mez.  Osman Bey ve Alplerinin Bizans ordusuyla girdi─¤i ├Čl├╝m kal─▒m sava┼¤─▒ nas─▒l sonu├¦lanacak? Osman Bey, NikolaŌĆÖya destek i├¦in g├Čnderilen Bizans ordusunu durdurabilecek mi? NikolaŌĆÖn─▒n Ha├¦l─▒ ittifak─▒ plan─▒ dengeleri nas─▒l de─¤i┼¤tirecek? Bala Hatun, Osman BeyŌĆÖin evlilik karar─▒n─▒ nas─▒l kar┼¤─▒layacak? D├╝ndar Bey, beylik iddias─▒n─▒ s├╝rd├╝rmek i├¦in ne yapacak? PapaŌĆÖn─▒n ajanlar─▒ NikolaŌĆÖn─▒n plan─▒na nas─▒l destek verecek?

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ŌĆō Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
┬Ā
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ŌĆ£Godzilla vs. Kong,ŌĆØ the next epic adventure in LegendaryŌĆÖs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ŌĆ£Godzilla vs. KongŌĆØ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansŌĆöinstigated by unseen forcesŌĆöis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg├źrd (ŌĆ£Big Little Lies,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£The Little Drummer GirlŌĆØ), Millie Bobby Brown (ŌĆ£Stranger ThingsŌĆØ), Rebecca Hall (ŌĆ£Christine,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£Professor Marston and the Wonder WomenŌĆØ), Brian Tyree Henry (ŌĆ£Joker,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£Spider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseŌĆØ), Shun Oguri (ŌĆ£Weathering with YouŌĆØ), Eiza Gonz├Īlez (ŌĆ£Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawŌĆØ), Julian Dennison (ŌĆ£Deadpool 2ŌĆØ), with Kyle Chandler (ŌĆ£Godzilla: King of the MonstersŌĆØ) and Demi├Īn Bichir (ŌĆ£The Nun,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£The Hateful EightŌĆØ).
Wingard (ŌĆ£The Guest,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£YouŌĆÖre NextŌĆØ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (ŌĆ£Thor: RagnarokŌĆØ) and Max Borenstein (ŌĆ£Godzilla: King of the Monsters,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£Kong: Skull IslandŌĆØ), story by Terry Rossio (ŌĆ£Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesŌĆØ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (ŌĆ£Godzilla: King of the MonstersŌĆØ), based on the character ŌĆ£GodzillaŌĆØ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorŌĆÖs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (ŌĆ£The Mummy,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£World War ZŌĆØ), production designers Owen Paterson (ŌĆ£Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£GodzillaŌĆØ) and Thomas S. Hammock (ŌĆ£Blair WitchŌĆØ), editor Josh Schaeffer (ŌĆ£Godzilla: King of the MonstersŌĆØ), costume designer Ann Foley (ŌĆ£SkyscraperŌĆØ) and visual effects supervisor John ŌĆ£DJŌĆØ DesJardin (upcoming ŌĆ£Zack SnyderŌĆÖs Justice LeagueŌĆØ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ŌĆ£Godzilla vs. Kong.ŌĆØ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

╬Ü╬¼ŽĆ╬┐╬╣╬┐╬╣ ╬Ė╬▒ Žå╬┐Žü╬ŁŽā╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬Ę╬Į ŽĆ╬┐╬╗ŽŹŽä╬╣╬╝╬Ę ╬¼ŽāŽĆŽü╬Ę ŽĆ╬┐╬┤╬╣╬¼, ╬╗╬▒╬╝╬▓╬¼╬Į╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé ŽäŽü╬»╬▒ ┬½╬Į╬▒╬╣┬╗ ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé chef ╬║Žü╬╣Žä╬ŁŽé ╬ŻŽēŽä╬«Žü╬Ę ╬Ü╬┐╬ĮŽä╬╣╬Č╬¼, ╬Ā╬¼╬Į╬┐ ╬ÖŽē╬▒╬Į╬Į╬»╬┤╬Ę, ╬ø╬ĄŽē╬Į╬»╬┤╬▒ ╬Ü╬┐ŽģŽäŽāŽīŽĆ╬┐Žģ╬╗╬┐ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬Ė╬▒ ╬Š╬Ą╬║╬╣╬Į╬«Žā╬┐Žģ╬Į ╬ĄŽĆ╬»Žā╬Ę╬╝╬▒ Žä╬┐ ŽģŽĆ╬ŁŽü╬┐Žć╬┐ ╬╝╬▒╬│╬Ą╬╣Žü╬╣╬║Žī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬▒╬Š╬»╬┤╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐ MasterChef 5.╬¤╬╣ ŽģŽĆ╬┐Žł╬«Žå╬╣╬┐╬╣, ŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬Ė╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆ╬┐ŽāŽĆ╬¼Žā╬┐Žģ╬Į 2 ┬½╬Į╬▒╬╣┬╗ ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé chef ╬│╬╣╬▒ Žä╬Ę╬Į ŽĆŽü╬┐ŽāŽĆ╬¼╬Ė╬Ą╬╣╬¼ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé, ╬Ė╬▒ ╬ŁŽć╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬Ę ╬┤Žģ╬Į╬▒ŽäŽīŽä╬ĘŽä╬▒ ╬Į╬▒ ŽĆŽü╬┐ŽćŽēŽü╬«Žā╬┐Žģ╬Į ŽāŽä╬Ę╬Į ╬ĄŽĆŽī╬╝╬Ą╬Į╬Ę Žå╬¼Žā╬Ę ŽäŽē╬Į Bootcamp.

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceXŌĆÖs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ŌĆō approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipŌĆÖs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.
